/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,liblra_vision__rosidl_generator_c.so -o liblra_vision__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/lra_vision__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/lra_vision/msg/detail/calibration_status__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/lra_vision__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/lra_vision/srv/detail/calibrate_camera__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
